name: sys_whatsapp_message_issue_interaction
script:
def sys_whatsapp_message_issue(doc):

    def error_contact_not_found(unknown_number):
        frappe.log_error('Number does not match any contact', f'No contact/company found for {unknown_number}')
        # send template message to Paul with details of person who sent message
        # system notification to all support users 
        # send WhatsApp to number stating that they are not on the system
        
    def error_no_customer_on_contact(contact_name):
        frappe.log_error('No customer on contact', f'Contact Name {contact_name}')
        # template message to Paul 
        # system notification to users
        # send WhatsApp to user telling them to call Paul because their number could not be matched to any customer
        
    def get_contact(mobile_no):
        docs = frappe.get_list('Contact', filters={'mobile_no': mobile_no}, ignore_permissions=True)
        if docs:
            contact = frappe.get_doc('Contact', docs[0].get('name'))
            return contact
        else:
            return None
    
    def get_customer(contact_name):
        existing_links = frappe.get_all("Dynamic Link", filters={
            'link_doctype': 'Customer',
            'parent': contact_name  # Parent is the Contact document
        }, fields=['link_name'], ignore_permissions=True)
        
        if not existing_links:
            return None
        
        return existing_links[0].get('link_name')
    
    
    def wa_catch_director(doc, contact, customer):
        """ forward to active ticket, commence whatsapp command action, continue WhatsApp dialogue exchange or prompt user to command """
        
        def list_customer_issues():
            # Fetch active issues for the customer
            issues = frappe.get_all(
                "Issue",
                filters={"customer": customer, "status": ["!=", "Closed"]},
                fields=["name", "subject", "status"],
                ignore_permissions=True
            )
        
            if not issues:
                return "No active issues found for the customer."
        
            # Format the message with each issue in one line
            send_whatsapp_message(contact.mobile_no, "*Active Issues* for Customer: " + customer)
            for issue in issues:
                message = f"*Issue ID: {issue['name']}*, *Subject:* {issue['subject']}, *Status:* {issue['status']}"
                send_whatsapp_message(contact.mobile_no, message)
            
        
        def send_whatsapp_message(to, message):
                doc = frappe.get_doc({
                    'doctype': 'WhatsApp Message',
                    'to': to,
                    'content_type': 'text',
                    'type': 'Outgoing',
                    'message': message,
                })
                doc.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
        
        def create_issue(subject, description):
            frappe.log_error(customer, customer.name)
            issue = frappe.get_doc({
                'doctype': 'Issue',
                'subject': subject,
                'description': description,
                'status': 'Open',
                'customer': customer,
                'custom_contact_chat': contact
            })
            issue.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
            contact.custom_current_support_issue = issue.name
            contact.save(ignore_permissions=True)
        
        def forward_to_issue():
            doc.reference_doctype = 'Issue'
            doc.reference_name = contact.get('custom_current_support_issue')
            doc.save(ignore_permissions=True)
        
        def clear_whatsapp_dialogue_exchange():
            # Get the list of WhatsApp Dialogue Exchange documents matching the filters
            wdes = frappe.get_list('WhatsApp Dialogue Exchange', filters={
                'contact': contact.name,
                'active': 1,
                'whatsapp_dialogue': 'lpm0i21ut3'
            }, ignore_permissions=True)
            
            # Loop through the list and delete each document
            for wde in wdes:
                frappe.delete_doc('WhatsApp Dialogue Exchange', wde.get('name'), ignore_permissions=True)
                print(f"Deleted WhatsApp Dialogue Exchange: {wde.get('name')}")
        
        # check for / get active wa_exchanges and get next wde item + send it
        def check_wa_exchange():
            wdes = frappe.get_list(doctype='WhatsApp Dialogue Exchange', filters={'contact': contact.name, 'active': 1}, ignore_permissions=True)
            if wdes:
                wde = frappe.get_doc(doctype='WhatsApp Dialogue Exchange', name=wdes[0].get('name'), ignore_permissions=True)
                wde.load_from_db()
                wde_table = wde.get('wde_table')
                
                whatsapp_dialogue = frappe.get_doc('WhatsApp Dialogue', wde.whatsapp_dialogue, ignore_permissions=True)
                whatsapp_dialogue.load_from_db()
                
                continue_wa_exchange(whatsapp_dialogue, wde)
                return True
            else:
                return False
        
        def continue_wa_exchange(whatsapp_dialogue, wde):
            wd_table = whatsapp_dialogue.wd_table
            wde_table = wde.get('wde_table')
        
            def append_new_row():
                new_row = wde.append('wde_table', {})
                new_row.content_type_received = 'text'
                wde.save(ignore_permissions=True)
                
            if len(wde_table) < len(wd_table):
                if wde_table:
                    wde_table[-1].content = doc.message
                    wde.save(ignore_permissions=True)
                next_message_item = wd_table[len(wde_table)]
                append_new_row()
                send_whatsapp_message(contact.mobile_no, next_message_item.send_text)
            else:
                wde.active = 0
                wde_table[-1].content = doc.message
                wde.save(ignore_permissions=True)
                create_issue(wde_table[0].get('content'), wde_table[1].get('content'))
                send_whatsapp_message(contact.mobile_no, f'Thank you {contact.first_name}, your issue has been successfully logged. We will be in touch with you shortly.')
        
        def whatsapp_command_action():
            # start add issue exchange
            if doc.get('message').startswith('/add_issue'):
                clear_whatsapp_dialogue_exchange()
                new_wde = frappe.get_doc({
                    'doctype': 'WhatsApp Dialogue Exchange',
                    'contact': contact.name,
                    'whatsapp_dialogue': 'lpm0i21ut3',
                    'active': 1
                })
                new_wde.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
                check_wa_exchange()
                return
                
            # list all active issues
            elif doc.get('message').startswith('/list_issues'):
                list_customer_issues()
                return
            
            # change to a specific active issue
            elif doc.get('message').startswith('/change_issue'):
                send_whatsapp_message(contact.mobile_no, 'Type /list_issue and reply to the ticket you want to switch to please')
                return
            
            # clear contact active issue
            elif doc.get('message').startswith('/clear_working_issue'):
                contact.custom_current_support_issue = ''
                contact.save(ignore_permissions=True)
                send_whatsapp_message(contact.mobile_no, 'You now have a clean slate!')
                return
            
            
        def help_message():
            help_wa = frappe.get_doc({
                'doctype': 'WhatsApp Message',
                'message': (
                    f"Hello {contact.get('first_name')}! Here are the commands you can use to manage your issues:\n\n"
                    "**/add_issue**: Use this command to create a new issue.\n"
                    "Example: `/add_issue`\n"
                    "This will create a new issue with the subject and description you provide.\n\n"
                    "**/list_issues**: Use this command to see a list of all your open issues.\n"
                    "Example: `/list_issues`\n"
                    "This will return a summary of all open issues linked to your account.\n\n"
                    "**/change_issue**: Use this command to switch to a specific issue ticket.\n"
                    "Example: `/change_issue`\n"
                    "Reply to the issue message you want to interact and chat with. Once switched, "
                    "any updates or messages will apply to that specific issue.\n\n"
                    "Feel free to reach out if you have further questions."
                ),
                'to': doc.get('from'),
                'content_type': "text",
                "type": 'Outgoing'
            })
            help_wa.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
        
        if doc.content_type == 'text':
            
            if doc.is_reply == 1:
                replied_to_message = frappe.get_list(
                    doctype='WhatsApp Message',
                    fields=['*'],
                    filters={'message_id': doc.reply_to_message_id},
                    ignore_permissions=True
                )
                frappe.log_error(replied_to_message[0].get('message')[12:27])
                if replied_to_message:
                    contact.custom_current_support_issue = replied_to_message[0].get('message')[11:25]
                    contact.save(ignore_permissions=True)
                    doc.reference_doctype = 'Issue'
                    doc.reference_name = contact.custom_current_support_issue
                    doc.save(ignore_permissions=True)
                    send_whatsapp_message(contact.mobile_no, f'You are now interacting with ticket: {contact.custom_current_support_issue}')
                    return
            
            # FIRST check for commence whatsapp command action
            if doc.get('message').startswith(('/add_issue', '/list_issues', '/change_issue', '/clear_working_issue')):
                whatsapp_command_action() 
                return
            
            # check or continue WhatsApp exchange
            if check_wa_exchange():
                return
            
            # forward to active issue on contact
            # get contact with linked issue and link WhatsApp message to issue
            if contact.get('custom_current_support_issue'):
                forward_to_issue()
                return
            
            help_message()
        else:
            # forward to active issue on contact
            # get contact with linked issue and link WhatsApp message to issue
            if contact.get('custom_current_support_issue'):
                forward_to_issue()
                return
            
            help_message()

    # Checks 
    if not doc.get('type') == 'Incoming':
        return
    
    contact = get_contact(doc.get('from'))
    if not contact:
        error_contact_not_found(doc.get('from'))
        return
    
    customer = get_customer(contact.name)
    if not customer:
        error_no_customer_on_contact(contact.name)
        return
    
    wa_catch_director(doc, contact, customer)


#doc = frappe.get_doc('WhatsApp Message', doc.name)    
sys_whatsapp_message_issue(doc)

def before_insert(doc, method):
    # Ensure the message is not linked to any other document
    doc.reference_doctype = None
    doc.reference_name = None


doc.reference_doctype = None
